stack: Next.js 15.5 + TS strict + Tailwind 3 + Dexie + Auth.js + Anthropic/OpenAI/Gemini SDKs

extras.demo_mode: one-click seeded inbox (12 emails) — no API keys needed
extras.ai_demo_video: pnpm video generates a narrated 90s walkthrough (Playwright + ElevenLabs + FFmpeg)
extras.ai_video_qa: pnpm video:review uploads to Gemini 2.5 Pro for timestamped production critique
